TerraSwarm Annual Meeting: October 11 & 12, 2017 (Source: Housing at Berkeley ) The TerraSwarm Annual Meeting was held October 11 & 12, 2017 in Berkeley. Overview The purpose of this annual meeting was to review our accomplishments. Location o

was to review our accomplishments. Location of the Meeting and Parking The meeting was held at the Clark Kerr Campus, 2601 Warring St Berkeley, CA 94720. Program Tuesday, October 10: Demo setup 7am - 11pm. Wednesday, October 11: Registration at

7am - 11pm. Wednesday, October 11: Registration at 11am, lunch at noon , first talk at 1pm, dinner at 6:30 Thursday, October 12: Breakfast at 8:30, first talk at 9:00 , end at 1:50. Industry caucus: 1:50-2:50 See the Program for details. Important

1:50-2:50 See the Program for details. Important Dates Registration closed at 12:40pm PDT on Thursday, October 5. Posters : Please upload your poster to the TerraSwarm and SRC sites. Additional instructions Questions? Concerns? Contact Mary Stewart
